Abstract: "The withdrawal requests ₳120,000,000, with USD figures included only as planning references at the $0.16/ADA assumption."

Abstract states "12-month community-overseen program", executed by AlphaGrowth under Operating Group oversight; "Intersect acts as Constitutional Administrator and manages the withdrawn funds directly."
Rationale: AlphaGrowth produces analyses/recommendations/disbursement memos; Operating Group may veto or condition material actions; Intersect manages funds into a separate auditable account.
Rationale: "The Operating Group does not hold program funds, and AlphaGrowth does not unilaterally hold or control program funds."
Rationale: "includes a dedicated ₳2,000,000 independent audit or assurance allocation".
Abstract lists all seven mechanisms verbatim, including the Month 4 Phase 3 release gate and abstain delegation while funds are held before disbursement.
Rationale: "defines six return triggers for unused, unearned, unreleased, or excess funds".
Motivation: "As of June 2026, Cardano DeFi has approximately $90M in TVL and $45M in stablecoin supply".
Disclosure sentence appears verbatim in the rationale's Prior Treasury Funding Disclosure section.
